name: Earthshattering Event
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>驚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a card(s) is sent from the Deck to the Graveyard: Target 1 card in either player's Graveyard; shuffle it into the Deck, also neither player can send cards from the Deck to the Graveyard for the rest of this turn.
eff: If a card(s) is sent from the Deck to the Graveyard: Target 1 card in either player's Graveyard; shuffle it into the Deck, also neither player can send cards from the Deck to the Graveyard for the rest of this turn.

action: Prevents sending cards from Deck to Graveyard
